title: Physiotherapist
description:
Job Summary

You will lead the planning and execution of physiotherapy rehabilitation services at the Senior Care Centre, driving client health outcomes and operational improvements. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to deliver holistic care and enhance service efficiency.

Responsibilities

  • Plan and deliver physiotherapy rehabilitation programs tailored to senior clients at the Day Rehabilitation Centre to improve muscle strength, balance, endurance, and fine motor skills
  • Train Therapy Assistants and staff on physiotherapy techniques and best practices to enhance team capabilities and client care quality
  • Conduct comprehensive client assessments upon admission and during periodic reviews to evaluate therapy needs and progress
  • Develop and implement individualized therapy treatment plans aligned with clients’ health goals and care plans
  • Lead group therapy sessions and activities designed to promote physical and cognitive well-being among day care clients
  • Maintain accurate and timely documentation of therapy records to ensure compliance and continuity of care
  • Identify and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives across workflow, IT systems, exercise regimes, marketing, facility management, and financial performance of the Day Rehabilitation Centre
  • Collaborate with supervisors and multidisciplinary teams to ensure holistic health coverage and follow-up on client care plans
  • Demonstrate reliability and independence in managing assigned duties and respond proactively to additional tasks as directed by supervisors

Required competencies and certifications

  • Degree or Diploma in Physiotherapy
  • Qualified and registered with the Allied Health Professions Council
  • Minimum 3 years of physiotherapy experience in hospital or eldercare settings

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Passion for engaging with and caring for senior clients
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills to effectively interact with clients, families, and team members
  • Proven ability to work independently and maintain high reliability in delivering quality care

postedCompany.description:
Geylang East Home For The Aged (GEHA)

  • Founded in 1978
  • Charity Registration Number: 0342
  • ROS 165/2001 WEL
  • IPC NO. 000389
  • Managed fully by a team of dedicated volunteers
  • It has been providing many needy elderly with a place of comfort since 1978. 
  • Depend on donations from well-wishers and the public
  • Besides receiving nominal fee from service users, we organized events and activities for funds to defray expenses

Vision

To promote a community spirit of helping out one another, and encourage the extension of one’s love

for their kith and kin, to the people and environment around them.
 

Mission

To improve the quality of life of the elderly through the effective use of available resources; thereby fulfilling the “ageing in place” philosophy of Geylang East Home For The Aged.

The following are the programmes / services provided by the GEHA

1.            Blk 97, Geylang East Home for the Aged (Sheltered Home):

A residential home to the needy old folks

To-date, we have a total of 37 home residents, consisting of 22 males and 15 females.

2.            Blk 96, Geylang East Senior Care Centre (SCC):

A place which provides integrated day care facilities in one convenient location.

（1） Maintenance Day Care provides day care (social activities and meals) for seniors while their

caregivers are at work

（2） Rehabilitation Day Services for residents who require rehabilitation services to improve muscle

strength, balance, endurance and fine motor skills.

（3） Dementia Day Care provides structured group and individual activities for person diagnosed

with mild and moderate dementia

3.            Blk 98, Geylang East Active Ageing Centre (AAC) 

The Centre will serve as a go-to point for all seniors in the community and provide an “ABC”

suite of services:

- Active ageing

- Befriending and buddying

Information and referral to Care services
postedCompany.name: Geylang East Home For The Aged
